core_types.description: Large body of work spanning multiple issues
core_types.name: epic

core_types.description: Timeboxed investigation to reduce uncertainty before committing to a story
core_types.name: spike

core_types.description: User story describing a feature from the user's perspective
core_types.name: story

core_types.description: Marks completion of a set of related issues (contains no work itself)
core_types.name: milestone
